message:
feat(cli,ci,conformance,docs): read-write mount CLI flag, hardened CI pipeline, new conformance tests

Why these changes exist:

The preceding three commits added write-path capabilities across the
stack (allocator, core engine, MVCC, journal, FUSE).  This commit
updates the user-facing entry points, CI infrastructure, documentation,
and test harness to exercise and document those capabilities.

CLI (ffs-cli):
- Adds the --rw flag to the mount subcommand, enabling read-write FUSE
  mounts.  The default remains read-only for safety.  The help text is
  updated from "read-only" to reflect the new option.
- Threads the rw flag through to FrankenFuse so the FUSE layer's
  read_only guard activates or deactivates accordingly.

CI workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml):
- Adds an Environment step (system info, Rust toolchain version, available
  resources) to both the lint-and-test and golden-verification jobs for
  better debuggability of CI failures.
- Sets RUST_LOG=ffs=debug globally so structured tracing output appears in
  CI logs, aiding post-mortem analysis.
- Replaces the separate fixture-generation and verify-goldens steps with a
  streamlined pipeline: fixture checksum verification, golden checksum
  verification, canonical golden verification script, and a smoke E2E run.
- Sets SKIP_MOUNT=1 in the golden verification job since CI runners lack
  FUSE privileges.
- Adds an upload-artifact step on failure to capture diagnostic files
  (build deps, golden outputs, E2E logs).
- Updates the golden-change-check job to detect changes under the new
  conformance/golden/ and conformance/fixtures/ paths instead of the old
  tests/fixtures/golden/ layout.

Conformance tests (ffs-harness):
- Adds new conformance test cases that exercise the write path: block
  allocation persistence, journal write-replay roundtrip, and MVCC
  chain-cap enforcement under concurrent writers.

Golden checksums (conformance/golden/checksums.sha256):
- Updated to reflect outputs from the expanded conformance test suite.

Feature parity documentation (FEATURE_PARITY.md):
- Updates the ext4 journal replay row from phase-1-only to note write-side
  Jbd2Writer and self-replayability verification.
- Promotes the ext4 allocator row from "not implemented" to phase-A with
  correctness-first contiguous alloc, reserved-block exclusion, on-disk
  GDT persistence, and double-free detection.
- Expands the version retention policy row to document chain-pressure
  handling, oldest-snapshot force-advance, and crossbeam-epoch deferred
  reclamation.

Workspace (Cargo.toml, Cargo.lock):
- Adds crossbeam-epoch to workspace dependencies; lockfile updated
  accordingly.

Beads tracker (.beads/issues.jsonl):
- Updates bead status entries to reflect completed implementation of the
  persistent allocator, journal writer, MVCC backpressure, and FUSE write
  operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,6 +9,7 @@ on:
 env:
   CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
   RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
+  RUST_LOG: ffs=debug
 
 jobs:
   lint-and-test:
@@ -27,14 +28,30 @@ jobs:
       - name: Cache cargo
         uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
 
+      - name: Environment
+        run: |
+          echo "::group::System Info"
+          uname -a
+          cat /etc/os-release 2>/dev/null || true
+          echo "::endgroup::"
+          echo "::group::Rust Toolchain"
+          rustc -Vv
+          cargo -V
+          echo "::endgroup::"
+          echo "::group::Available Resources"
+          nproc
+          free -h 2>/dev/null || true
+          df -h .
+          echo "::endgroup::"
+
       - name: Format check
         run: cargo fmt --check
 
       - name: Clippy
         run: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
 
-      - name: Build
-        run: cargo build --workspace
+      - name: Check
+        run: cargo check --all-targets
 
       - name: Unit tests
         run: cargo test --workspace
@@ -45,6 +62,8 @@ jobs:
     name: Golden Verification
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     needs: lint-and-test
+    env:
+      SKIP_MOUNT: 1
 
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
@@ -56,20 +75,60 @@ jobs:
       - name: Cache cargo
         uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
 
-      - name: Install e2fsprogs (ext4 tools)
-        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y e2fsprogs
+      - name: Environment
+        run: |
+          echo "::group::System Info"
+          uname -a
+          cat /etc/os-release 2>/dev/null || true
+          echo "::endgroup::"
+          echo "::group::Rust Toolchain"
+          rustc -Vv
+          cargo -V
+          echo "::endgroup::"
+          echo "::group::Available Resources"
+          nproc
+          free -h 2>/dev/null || true
+          df -h .
+          echo "::endgroup::"
+
+      - name: Install ext4 tools for smoke test
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update
+          sudo apt-get install -y e2fsprogs
+
+      - name: Verify fixture checksums
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          if ! (cd conformance/fixtures && sha256sum -c checksums.sha256); then
+            echo "::error file=conformance/fixtures/checksums.sha256::Checksum mismatch - fixtures changed without updating checksums"
+            exit 1
+          fi
 
-      - name: Install btrfs-progs
-        run: sudo apt-get install -y btrfs-progs
+      - name: Verify golden checksums
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          if ! (cd conformance/golden && sha256sum -c checksums.sha256); then
+            echo "::error file=conformance/golden/checksums.sha256::Checksum mismatch - golden outputs changed without updating checksums"
+            exit 1
+          fi
 
-      - name: Generate ext4 fixtures
-        run: ./scripts/fixtures/make_ext4_fixtures.sh
+      - name: Run canonical golden verification
+        run: ./scripts/verify_golden.sh
 
-      - name: Generate btrfs fixtures
-        run: ./scripts/fixtures/make_btrfs_fixtures.sh
+      - name: Run smoke E2E
+        run: ./scripts/e2e/ffs_smoke.sh
 
-      - name: Verify golden outputs
-        run: ./scripts/verify-goldens.sh
+      - name: Upload diagnostics on failure
+        if: failure()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: ci-failure-diagnostics
+          if-no-files-found: warn
+          path: |
+            target/debug/deps/ffs-*.d
+            conformance/golden/*.json
+            conformance/fixtures/checksums.sha256
+            artifacts/e2e/**/*.log
 
   # Warn if goldens are modified in a PR
   golden-change-check:
@@ -85,11 +144,12 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Check for golden changes
         run: |
-          if git diff --name-only origin/${{ github.base_ref }}...HEAD | grep -q "tests/fixtures/golden"; then
+          changed_files="$(git diff --name-only origin/${{ github.base_ref }}...HEAD)"
+          if echo "$changed_files" | grep -qE '(^conformance/golden/|^conformance/fixtures/)'; then
             echo "::warning::Golden outputs modified - ensure this is intentional"
             echo ""
             echo "Changed files:"
-            git diff --name-only origin/${{ github.base_ref }}...HEAD | grep "tests/fixtures/golden" || true
+            echo "$changed_files" | grep -E '(^conformance/golden/|^conformance/fixtures/)' || true
           else
             echo "No golden output changes detected"
           fi

@@ -52,6 +52,7 @@ blake3 = "1.6.0"
 clap = { version = "4.5.0", features = ["derive"] }
 crc32c = "0.6.8"
 criterion = { version = "0.5.1", features = ["html_reports"] }
+crossbeam-epoch = "0.9.18"
 hex = "0.4.3"
 insta = "1.42.1"
 libc = "0.2.181"

@@ -32,8 +32,8 @@
 | ext4 inode device read | `fs/ext4/inode.c` | ✅ | `OpenFs::read_inode` via `ByteDevice` |
 | ext4 path resolution | `fs/ext4/namei.c` | ✅ | `OpenFs::resolve_path` |
 | ext4 bitmap free space reading | `fs/ext4/balloc.c` | ✅ | `OpenFs::free_space_summary`, bitmap-derived free block/inode counts |
-| ext4 journal replay parity | `fs/ext4/ext4_jbd2.c` | 🟡 | Phase 1 implemented in `ffs-journal` (descriptor/commit/revoke replay + tests); full mount-path integration and complete parity still pending |
-| ext4 allocator parity | `fs/ext4/mballoc.c` | ❌ | Not yet implemented |
+| ext4 journal replay parity | `fs/ext4/ext4_jbd2.c` | 🟡 | Replay + write-side implemented in `ffs-journal` (`replay_jbd2`, `Jbd2Writer` with descriptor/data/revoke/commit blocks, self-replayability verified). `OpenFs::commit_transaction_journaled` integration boundary in `ffs-core`. Checkpoint/space management pending. |
+| ext4 allocator parity | `fs/ext4/mballoc.c` | 🟡 | Phase A: correctness-first contiguous alloc with reserved-block exclusion, on-disk GDT persistence, double-free detection. `alloc_blocks_persist` / `free_blocks_persist` in `ffs-alloc`. Buddy-style search and preallocation pending. |
 | ext4 orphan recovery parity | `fs/ext4/orphan.c` | 🟡 | Read-only orphan-list detection/traversal implemented (`OpenFs::read_ext4_orphan_list` + CLI inspect diagnostics); mutating orphan cleanup still pending |
 | btrfs superblock decode | `fs/btrfs/disk-io.c` | ✅ | Implemented in `ffs-ondisk` |
 | btrfs btree header decode | `fs/btrfs/ctree.c` | ✅ | Implemented in `ffs-ondisk` |
@@ -49,7 +49,7 @@
 | MVCC snapshot visibility | FrankenFS spec §3 | ✅ | Implemented in `ffs-mvcc` |
 | MVCC commit sequencing | FrankenFS spec §3 | ✅ | Implemented in `ffs-mvcc` |
 | FCW conflict detection | FrankenFS spec §3 | ✅ | Implemented in `ffs-mvcc` |
-| version retention policy | FrankenFS spec §3 | ✅ | In-memory retention with `VersionData::Identical` dedup (zero-copy for unchanged blocks), configurable `CompressionPolicy` (dedup + max chain length cap), watermark-safe pruning in `ffs-mvcc::compression` |
+| version retention policy | FrankenFS spec §3 | ✅ | In-memory retention with `VersionData::Identical` dedup (zero-copy for unchanged blocks), configurable `CompressionPolicy` (dedup + max chain length cap), watermark-safe pruning, chain-pressure handling (oldest-snapshot force-advance + `CommitError::ChainBackpressure`), and crossbeam-epoch deferred reclamation counters/collection (`ebr_stats`, `ebr_collect`) in `ffs-mvcc` |
 | COW block rewrite path | FrankenFS spec §3 | ✅ | Allocation-backed COW rewrite path implemented in `ffs-mvcc` (`write_cow`, logical→physical mapping visibility, deferred-free + watermark GC integration) |
 | durability policy model | FrankenFS spec §4 | ✅ | Bayesian expected-loss selector |
 | asupersync config mapping | FrankenFS spec §4 | ✅ | `RaptorQConfig` mapping implemented |

@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
-e508df4afdf404cea479006170309c73b50f0230ba03f3d4af0c9b4844a57826  ext4_8mb_reference.json
 0663367a08dd3f851ef1f638fd99c8dc46ce69a3db6dc15449352616ad2f0a2a  ext4_64mb_reference.json
+633dd143714666b0a762c25dc475ecfcae9bd364c284cc6de60a221eee54a08f  ext4_64mb_sparse_super.json
+e508df4afdf404cea479006170309c73b50f0230ba03f3d4af0c9b4844a57826  ext4_8mb_reference.json
 cda5843addf691f031e94f5470114f539ebbb32c20ff60ade0db629ac92b5586  ext4_dir_index_reference.json
+1737b14d8e5a4f83156d87d8473061d9a9e1e91e9ae0d13812e32018246aaf8e  ext4_htree_dirindex.json
